rulings.Case Title: SFBA INVESTMENT GROUP, LLC VS. JAYDIPSINH DEVDHARA ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 19, 2022 line 1. RESPONDENTS JAYDIPSINH DEVDHARA AND VIKRAMSINH DEVDHARA'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. The Court notes that Respondent only moves for summary judgment and not for summary adjudication. Moving party failed to shift its burden as to the fourth cause of action re: entitlement to a judgment as a matter of law on violation of confidentiality and lack of triable issues of fact. The Court further notes that the Notice of Motion, the Points and Authorities are internally inconsistent by apparently referencing the issue of additional attorneys' fees in the Notice of Motion only as a part of undefined "other relief," (see Reply) and by addressing the same issue as "first cause of action" in the Points and Authorities and Separate Statement (e.g. Separate Statement (2:3-5). =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: WENDY HEMMING VS. PARCEL F OWNER LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion To Strike Wendy Hemmings New Reply Argument Or In The Alternative Motion For Leave To File Sur-Reply (Notice)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 19, 2022 line 7. DEFENDANT PARCEL F OWNER LLC'S MOTION TO STRIKE WENDY HEMMING'S NEW REPLY ARGUMENT, OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE SUR-REPLY is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. "Public dedication" issue is considered re: Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment only to the extent it is brought up, supported by authority and facts in the moving papers. rulings.Case Title: WENDY HEMMING VS. PARCEL F OWNER LLC ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative For Summary Adjudication

rulings.Case Title: SONHUI OLSON VS. MARK BRUNIG ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for May 19, 2022 line 2. DEFENDANT MARK BRUNIG'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of the causes of action subject to this demurrer. Plaintiff shall have 10 days from notice of entry of order to file an amended complaint. Late-filed opposition is stricken. Furthermore, a hearing is set for June 23, 2022 for Plaintiff's counsel, Dennis Phillips, to address why an order to show cause shall not issue for Plaintiff's failure to participate in good faith in the meet and confer process required under CCP 430.41. Dennis Phillips to file a response no later than June 16, 2022. If counsel's explanation is satisfactory, the hearing will be taken off calendar. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests.
